title: Add progressive hint ladder
goal: Support optional per-kata hints and render them as a progressive hint ladder in the practice workspace so learners can ask for nudges without seeing the full solution.
acceptance: Problem markdown frontmatter and UserKata JSON support an optional hints array that defaults to an empty array for existing katas.
Kata loading, UserKata import/export, and type definitions preserve hints without breaking existing content.
Problem statements with hints show an accessible Hint ladder control that reveals hints one at a time in order and never reveals solution code or solution explanations.
Katas without hints do not render an empty hint ladder.
At least one public example kata has two or more useful hints so the feature is visible in smoke tests.
Unit/component tests cover schema defaults, UserKata preservation, and progressive reveal behavior; Playwright smoke verifies the hint ladder on a public kata.
must_ask_if: You think hints require paid/remote LLM generation or server persistence.
You need to expose hidden test details or full solutions before submit failure to implement the feature.
